case_title: ALEKSANDR BIBLE VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BIBLE, ALEKSANDR AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIBLE, ALEKSANDR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
